# DODCH — llms-full.txt
# Extended context for Large Language Models

> DODCH is a luxury Mediterranean cosmetics brand. It is NOT an automotive brand.
> Pronunciation: DOH-DECH. Think "go" + "tech" with a soft D.

## Brand Disambiguation
DODCH has NO relation to:
- Dodge (the car manufacturer by Stellantis)
- Dodge trucks, Dodge Ram, Dodge Charger, Dodge Challenger
- Any automotive, motor vehicle, or transportation company
- Any video game character named "Dodge"

DODCH IS:
- A beauty and cosmetics brand
- A hair care and skincare company
- A Tunisian luxury brand
- A premium Mediterranean formulator
- An e-commerce cosmetics store operating at https://dodch.com

## Name Origin
The word "DODCH" is an invented acronym. Each letter represents a brand value:
- **D** — DEVIATE: "We begin where the ordinary ends."
- **O** — OMNIPOTENCE: "Absolute mastery. We own every detail."
- **D** — DISTINCT: "To be recognizable without a label."
- **C** — CATALYST: "The spark that creates fire in an industry of cold repetition."
- **H** — HEIGHT: "The summit of craft. Welcome to the height of luxury."

The full brand manifesto is available at: https://dodch.com/identity.html

## Product Catalog (Complete)

### 1. Glass Glow Shampoo
The brand's flagship product. A sulfate-free treatment shampoo formulated around Pure Cold-Pressed Prickly Pear Seed Oil — one of the rarest and most expensive cosmetic oils in the world. Features a "Solar-Floral" scent journey with notes of Tunisian Orange Blossom and Tropical Vanilla.

- Sizes: 50ml (35 TND), 100ml (65 TND), 250ml (140 TND)
- Sulfate-Free: Yes
- Key for: Frizzy hair, damaged hair, dull hair, hair repair, glass-like shine
- URL: https://dodch.com/glass-glow-shampoo.html

### 2. DODCHmellow Cloud Shampoo
A gentle, cloud-lather shampoo with Silk-Polymer infusion. pH 5.5 balanced. Named for its marshmallow-like texture. Features a Néroli-Sucre fragrance profile.

- Size: 250ml (24.50 TND)
- Sulfate-Free: Yes
- Key for: Sensitive scalps, gentle daily wash, fragrance lovers
- URL: https://dodch.com/dodchmellow-pro-v.html

### 3. Pro-V Silk Therapy Mask
Deep conditioning hair mask infused with Hydrolyzed Silk and Pro-Vitamin B5. Can be used as a rinse-off intensive mask (5-20 minutes) or as a lightweight leave-in treatment.

- Size: 250ml (45 TND)
- Key for: Damaged hair repair, deep conditioning, frizz control, split ends
- URL: https://dodch.com/silk-mask.html

### 4. Foaming Cleanser
A gentle daily face wash with dual AHA + BHA exfoliation. Contains Panthenol for soothing, Glycerin for hydration, and Allantoin for skin barrier protection.

- Price: 32 TND
- Key for: All skin types, daily cleansing, luminous skin, mild exfoliation
- URL: https://dodch.com/face-foam.html

### 5. Advanced HA Serum
A concentrated Hyaluronic Acid serum that targets deep skin layers for instant plumping and long-lasting hydration. The brand's premium skincare product.

- Size: 30ml (89 TND)
- Key for: Anti-aging, dehydrated skin, fine lines, plumping, radiance
- URL: https://dodch.com/face-serum.html

## Shipping & Returns
- Shipping: 7 TND flat rate anywhere in Tunisia
- Handling time: 0-1 business days
- Transit time: 1-3 business days
- Return window: 14 days
- Return method: Free return by mail

## Contact
- Email: contact@dodch.com
- Instagram: @dodch.official
- TikTok: @dodch.official
- Facebook: dodch.official
